name: Southern Love
tagline: The only serious soul food on Oahu — shrimp and grits that locals call the best in Hawaii, cooked to order in Kakaako.
mustOrder: shrimp and grits — widely called the best in Hawaii
catfish po'boy — Southern classic done right
parking: Street parking on Queen St; paid lots in Kakaako
talkStory: Chef Corey Love and partner Elizabeth Martinez brought authentic Southern soul food to an island that desperately needed it. Everything is cooked to order — fried chicken, BBQ ribs, biscuits and gravy, catfish. Featured on Hawaii News Now. Short hours, closed Sun–Mon, limited parking — all the signs of a real local joint, not a tourist operation. Opened 2023 and already has a devoted following with a 4.8 Google rating. The only place on Oahu filling this niche.
